name: GG Nagarkar
headline: Founder building practical AI agents, DevOps automation, and enterprise software systems
shortBio: Founder and product engineer focused on practical AI systems, DevOps automation, and enterprise software delivery. I build products and teams that turn complex technical goals into measurable business outcomes.
highlights: Founder of Applied AI Consulting and building OpsRabbit
Co-founder and product builder across OpexSoftware, REAN Cloud, 7Targets, and OpsRabbit
US patents in cloud testing and infrastructure automation
Enterprise AI, DevOps/SRE, cloud platform engineering, and product delivery leadership
